nasb.text: and he shall lay his hand on the head of his offering and slay it before the tent of meeting, and Aaron’s sons shall sprinkle its blood around on the altar.

esv.text: lay his hand on the head of his offering, and kill it in front of the tent of meeting; and Aaron’s sons shall throw its blood against the sides of the altar.

cnv.text: 按手在他的供物的頭上，在會幕門口宰殺牠；亞倫的子孫要把羊血潑在祭壇的四周。

ccb.text: 将手放在羊头上，在会幕前宰杀。亚伦的子孙要把羊羔的血洒在祭坛四周。
